required_preferences.fact: Pauses all family weekend hikes; prioritizes indoor family activities until cleared for hiking post-sprain

supersedes.fact: Prioritizes family weekend hikes over solo exercise — only rarely works out alone

required_preferences.fact: Actively avoids scheduling playdates and group activities for his preschool-aged daughter, instead prioritizing low-key one-on-one time at home or with family while she copes with her close friend's departure

supersedes.fact: Now relies on last-minute, flexible playdates with other local parents or accepts spontaneous visits, due to increased solo parenting and unpredictable childcare gaps after his parents' move

required_preferences.fact: Shifts from handwritten thank-you notes to pre-printed cards for packaging most orders, reserving handwritten notes only for special/custom requests during periods of heavy order volume
Now checks Etsy shop stats multiple times throughout the day, including afternoons and evenings, to monitor ongoing order surges and troubleshoot issues in real time
Refreshes kids’ play routines with more storytime and tabletop games to minimize active movement during his ankle recovery
Introduces daily family fruit bowls as a main after-dinner snack, fully eliminating chips, cookies, or processed treats for everyone

persona: A stay-at-home parent running a handmade crafts shop on Etsy
